overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player drives through downtown streets, underpasses, and commercial plazas with heavy rain, reflective wet roads, and dense urban cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown arterial road with distinctive yellow crosswalks

events.description: waiting at intersection traffic light then proceeding forward
accelerating to follow traffic flow on wet roads

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked downtown streets, navigating intersections with yellow grid crosswalks

notable_agents.action: orange sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: distinctive bright yellow striped crosswalk markings on wet reflective asphalt
commercial buildings with glowing neon signage and illuminated windows
tall street lamps casting light through the heavy rain
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle waiting at a rain-soaked intersection with distinctive yellow grid crosswalk markings. The driver accelerates through the downtown arterial road, following an orange sedan ahead while passing neon-lit storefronts and digital billboards visible through the rain-streaked windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete overpass structure

events.description: exiting underpass into broader open avenue with large billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the underpass and emerging onto a broader avenue with less dense traffic

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure passing overhead, creating sheltered area
metal safety barriers lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete overpass structure that temporarily shelters the road from the heavy rain, creating darker lighting conditions. After exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a broader avenue with large digital billboards visible in the distance and sparse traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with graffiti-covered walls and sidewalk pedestrians

events.description: making left turn at intersection onto narrower street
passing emergency vehicle with flashing lights parked on left side

entered.detail: brick wall covered in large white graffiti text reading PADRE
trees lining the sidewalk with green foliage visible in streetlight
covered bus stop or waiting area with bench
older brick apartment buildings with fire escapes

segments.scene_description: The driver executes a left turn onto a narrower urban street characterized by graffiti-covered brick walls and street trees lining the sidewalks. Pedestrians are visible walking along the wet pavement, and a red emergency vehicle is parked on the left with lights flashing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with outdoor dining and massive digital displays

events.description: entering large open plaza area with towering digital billboards
making right turn around plaza corner with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: driving through vibrant commercial district with massive neon advertisements and navigating around outdoor cafe seating

notable_agents.action: person with purple umbrella walking past outdoor cafe tables

entered.detail: towering building-sized digital advertisement screens with vivid neon colors
restaurant patio with tables, chairs, and red umbrellas along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a large commercial plaza dominated by massive digital billboards covering entire building facades with bright neon advertisements. The driver navigates a right turn around the plaza, passing outdoor cafe seating with red umbrellas and pedestrians carrying umbrellas on the wet sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with storefronts and intersections

events.description: making right turn at intersection onto new street
approaching and stopping at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: navigating final intersections through commercial streets, making turns and stopping at traffic signals

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal suspended over intersection
ground level shops with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle making a right turn onto another commercial street lined with ground-level storefronts. The driver approaches an intersection with an overhead traffic light, navigating through moderate traffic while rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-drenched metropolis, transitioning from a bright neon arterial road into a sheltered underpass and finally into a gritty urban side street. It begins at a rain-soaked intersection with yellow grid markings, accelerating past glowing storefronts and digital billboards while following an orange sedan through a rain-streaked windshield. As the vehicle enters a concrete overpass, the environment shifts into darker, sheltered lighting before opening back up into a broad avenue dominated by distant digital displays. The scene then shifts as the driver executes a left turn, moving away from the main thoroughfare toward a narrower street lined with graffiti-covered brick walls and street trees. Finally, the camera passes pedestrians on the wet pavement and a parked red emergency vehicle with flashing lights.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked commercial district that shifts from a plaza of towering digital displays to a dense street of ground-level storefronts. It begins as the vehicle enters a large plaza dominated by massive neon billboards covering entire building facades, navigating a right turn past outdoor cafe seating with red umbrellas and pedestrians on wet sidewalks. As the car clears the plaza, the scene shifts toward another commercial street where the scale of the architecture drops to a line of storefronts. The camera then follows the vehicle as it approaches a traffic intersection, weaving through moderate traffic while rain continues to fall on the reflective asphalt.
